security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes can be manipulated without proper validation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks robust input validation for votes.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate the integrity of vote messages.
An attacker can modify vote parameters before submission.

mitigation.strategy: Implement strict input validation and data integrity checks for all votes.

description: An attacker may alter the content of a vote to influence the outcome of a governance proposal.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of audit trail for votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide mechanisms to prove vote origin and authenticity.

assumptions: The system does not maintain a comprehensive audit log of votes cast.
There is no mechanism for verifiable vote attribution.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a secure and auditable logging mechanism to track all votes and their submitters.

description: An attacker may cast a vote and deny their participation, making it difficult to trace their actions.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be exposed without proper access control.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Votes are not protected against unauthorized access.

assumptions: The governance contract does not protect vote data against unauthorized disclosure.
An attacker could gain access to the database or contract storage.

mitigation.strategy: Implement appropriate access control mechanisms to restrict access to vote data.

description: An attacker may gain access to sensitive vote information, potentially revealing voting patterns or preferences.
